response.overview: Wish you had a ripped, sexy body like the extraordinary women of the WWE? With the help of WWE mogul and mother of 3, Stephanie McMahon, you can achieve a lean, sculpted physique. Crafted by world-renowned strength and conditioning coach Joe DeFranco, this system includes a 4-week calendar and transforms and strengthens the upper and lower body, chisels the abs, sheds fat with powerful cardio, and creates long, flexible muscle.
response.tagline: With the help of WWE mogul and mother of 3, Stephanie McMahon, you can achieve a lean, sculpted physique.
response.title: WWE Fit Series Stephanie McMahon
